§6Technetium Steel§f

§aCorrosion-resistant alloy that unlocks advanced machines and Bobmazon level 5!§f

§bTechnetium Steel§f is a steel-based alloy mixed with technetium-99 that gives it extreme corrosion resistance. It is essential for many mid-game machines and tools.

§6Production§f (Crucible or Blast Furnace):
§b• 1×§f Steel Ingot
§b• 1×§f Technetium-99 Nugget
§b→ §e1×§f Technetium Steel Ingot

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Barrels§f — stores highly corrosive fluids
§b• Research Reactor§f + §bBreeding Reactor§f — essential components
§b• Assembly Factory§f + §bChemical Factory§f
§b• Moderated RBMK Fuel Rods§f
§b• Gas Centrifuge Overclocking Upgrade§f
§b• Reactor Remote Control Block§f
§b• RTG and Radiolysis Chamber§f
§b• Maxwell Turret§f
§b• Deuterium Filter§f — needed for deuterium extraction

§eNote§f: §bCadmium Steel§f can substitute for §ealmost every§f recipe that uses Technetium Steel, giving you an alternative alloy path.

§6Bobmazon§f: Unlocks §eLevel 5§f Bobmazon access!
